# CRISPR-Cas9 in Cell Migration Studies

**Authors:** Smith J, Jones K
**Journal:** Nature Methods (2025)

## Summary
Comprehensive review of CRISPR-Cas9 applications in studying cell migration.

## Key Findings
- CRISPR knockout of p53 reduces migration by 40%
- Effect is dose-dependent on guide RNA concentration
